ddls:
CREATE TABLE "business_modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the business module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business module */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the module was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the module was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the module (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scripts" (
  "script_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test script */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business module the script belongs to */,
  "script_name" TEXT /* Name of the test script */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test script */,
  "execute" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the script should be executed */,
  "number_of_iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations to run the test script */,
  "start_index_for_iterations" INTEGER /* Starting index for the iterations */,
  "test_script_type" TEXT /* Type of test script (e.g., functional, regression) */,
  "test_data" TEXT /* Test data used for the script */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the script */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the script was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the script */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the script was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("script_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scripts_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES business_modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test execution */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test script executed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test execution started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test execution ended */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the test execution (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the test execution failed */,
  "logs" TEXT /* Detailed logs of the test execution */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* User who executed the test script */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the execution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the execution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES test_scripts ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tester, developer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control rule */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business module */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES business_modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test execution */,
  "test_script_name" TEXT /* Name of the test script */,
  "test_data" TEXT /* Test data used for the script */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual result of the test execution */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result of the test execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES test_executions ("execution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test execution */,
  "test_script_name" TEXT /* Name of the test script */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the defect */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the defect (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the defect (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES test_executions ("execution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_script_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test script version */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test script */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the test script */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_script_versions_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES test_scripts ("script_id")
)
